meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Master Debugging for Students
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn to set up Claude Code and Antigravity to build, debug, and ship professional-grade software as a student developer.
content.answer_block: To overcome debugging paralysis, integrate Claude Code into your workflow to perform autonomous root-cause analysis. Combine this with Antigravity to map dependency trees and visualize logic flows. By treating your IDE as an AI-augmented terminal, you transform opaque errors into actionable architectural fixes, accelerating your development lifecycle significantly.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal screen glowing with a stack trace that feels like a foreign language. The cursor blinks, mocking your progress, and the deadline for your first real-world project is closing in. You aren't just a student; you're an engineer in the making, but right now, you're stuck in the 'debugging desert' where code feels like a black box you can't open.

But what if you could change the physics of how you code? By mastering the synergy between Claude Code and Antigravity, you stop guessing and start architecting. This is the transition from 'struggling student' to 'AI-augmented builder.' Let's turn those red error lines into your greatest learning opportunities.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a secure connection between your local repository and the Claude Code CLI to enable context-aware debugging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and identify potential bottlenecks or circular dependencies in the module import graph.

steps.title: Mapping Logic Flows with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to visualize how data moves through your application, identifying exactly where state corruption occurs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a visual flow chart of the user authentication lifecycle and highlight every point where a null pointer exception could trigger.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'explain the state transition in auth.py'

steps.title: Automated Root-Cause Analysis
steps.description: Feed your stack trace into Claude Code to get a granular breakdown of the failure point without manual searching.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Take the provided error log and cross-reference it with the project's dependency graph to isolate the culprit module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude debug --file src/main.py --error 'TypeError: undefined is not a function'

steps.title: Refactoring via AI Pair Programming
steps.description: Execute a targeted refactor that fixes the bug while improving the overall code complexity metrics.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a refactored version of this function that adheres to SOLID principles and eliminates the identified race condition.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit src/main.py --prompt 'apply the proposed refactor to fix the race condition'

steps.title: Regression Testing and Verification
steps.description: Automate the verification of your fix by generating unit tests that target the previously failing edge case.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write comprehensive unit tests for the updated logic that cover both success paths and the previously identified error state.

pro_tips: Always provide the full project context in your first Claude Code session to ensure the AI understands your custom architectural patterns.
Use Antigravity's dependency graph to identify 'God Objects'—classes that are too connected and likely causing your debugging headaches.
When debugging, ask Claude Code to explain the 'why' behind the fix, not just the 'how', to accelerate your personal skill growth.
Maintain a 'knowledge-base.md' in your root folder that Claude Code can read to learn your specific coding style and naming conventions.
Never accept the first fix; ask for an alternative implementation to compare performance impacts and readability trade-offs.
content.next_steps: After mastering these debugging workflows, focus on deploying your project to a cloud environment and setting up CI/CD pipelines to ensure your code remains bug-free in production.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the same tools used by senior engineers to ship production-ready applications. Stop fearing the terminal and start controlling it. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
